title: Sporteq Rexnyl Heavy Filled 5FT Punch Bag Combos for All Ages & Genders | Boxing, Martial Arts, Commercial & Home Gym Use
features: SPORTEQ BOXING PUNCH BAGS: are well known among Gyms and Clubs who simply need a reliable and solid punchbag.
REXNYL KICK BOXING BAG: has a Rex Leather outer with a shock absorbing high density inner layer combined with a Fleece compound providing protection to your knuckles.
GREAT VALUE OF MONEY: This punch bag kit is great to use as it does not require lots of space to get a good workout.

TRAINING EQUIPMENT: This heavy-duty punch bag is the absolute must essential bit of kit for karate, boxing, blended hand to hand fighting (MMA) and additionally numerous styles of combative techniques. The basic role of the punching bag is to create control in the greater part of your hostile striking methods.
PUNCH BAG KIT: Includes punch bag with four strand chains.
